hooks.prompt: Check if the assistant's final response contains any incompleteness signals: TODO, placeholder, 'left as an exercise', 'I'll leave that to you', skeleton code, NotImplementedError, TBD, stub, 'you'll need to', 'as an exercise', pass-only function bodies, or trailing '...' as content. If ANY are found, respond with a short warning listing each signal found. If the response looks complete, respond with just 'ok'. Response text: $ARGUMENTS
